title: Contribution guide + symbol-intake governance (test/cultural/safety gates)
context: For open-pictograms to sustain beyond the initial Elyos push, the community must be able to contribute new symbols without the original maintainer's direct involvement in every review step. The contribution guide and symbol-intake governance document the end-to-end process for proposing, drawing, reviewing, and shipping a new symbol, including the non-negotiable quality gates (style lint, comprehension test, cultural review, safety expert sign-off for safety-aligned symbols). This is the M3 sustainability artifact.
objective: Write and publish the contribution guide and symbol-intake governance document so that new contributors can propose, draw, and submit symbols independently, and reviewers can onboard from the document alone.
acceptanceCriteria: Contribution guide covers the full new-symbol intake process: concept proposal (dedup check, conceptId assignment, category mapping), drawing (design-system rules, originality attestation), submission (PR structure, required metadata fields), and review stages (style lint, cultural review, comprehension test, safety expert review).
Governance section defines who can approve each stage, how reviewer rotation works, how a safety-domain expert is identified and onboarded, and how a cultural reviewer is identified per locale.

Document makes all quality gates explicit and non-negotiable: style-lint pass, recorded comprehension score at threshold, cultural clearance for people/body/concept symbols, and safety expert sign-off for safety-aligned symbols.

Structured so that a new contributor (with no prior knowledge of the project) can read the guide and open a correct PR for a new symbol; and a new reviewer can onboard and complete a review using the cultural checklist and safety SOP.
Published in CONTRIBUTING.md or docs/contribution-guide.md, versioned, and licensed CC-BY-4.0.
resources: open-pictograms-writing-002 (reviewer workflow + cultural-review checklist + safety SOP)
output: CONTRIBUTING.md (or docs/contribution-guide.md) — the contribution guide and symbol-intake governance document; versioned and licensed CC-BY-4.0.
